oneOf.title: bge-reranker-v2-m3
oneOf.description:
**Languages:** Multilingual (100+ languages)

**Use Cases:** Search result reranking, Document relevance scoring, Query-document matching refinement, RAG pipeline optimization

**Strengths:** State-of-the-art reranking performance, Excellent multilingual support, GPU-accelerated inference with Spyre, Improved retrieval accuracy for RAG applications
